title: Computer Vision Engineer
summary: Design, develop and deploy computer vision systems for tasks such as object detection, image segmentation, scene understanding, and visual inspection. Work closely with data engineers to curate and label training datasets, and collaborate with product teams to integrate models into production pipelines. Own the full ML lifecycle from research and prototyping through to optimisation and deployment on edge or cloud hardware.
responsibilities:
Build and fine-tune CV models (detection, segmentation, classification, pose estimation)
Manage training pipelines, experiment tracking, and model versioning
Optimise models for latency and memory constraints on embedded or edge devices
Write production-quality inference code and REST/gRPC model-serving APIs
Collaborate with annotation teams to define labelling guidelines and quality metrics
Monitor deployed model drift and implement continuous retraining workflows

title: Reinforcement Learning Engineer — Robotics
summary: Research and implement reinforcement learning algorithms to train autonomous robotic systems for manipulation, locomotion, and human-robot interaction. Bridge the sim-to-real gap by designing robust reward functions, domain randomisation strategies, and transfer learning approaches. Work in a cross-functional team alongside mechanical and electrical engineers to deploy trained policies on physical robot hardware.
responsibilities:
Design and implement RL algorithms (PPO, SAC, TD3, model-based RL) for robotic control tasks
Build and maintain simulation environments in MuJoCo, Isaac Gym, or Gazebo
Develop domain randomisation and curriculum learning pipelines to improve real-world transfer
Instrument robots with sensors and define observation/action spaces for policy learning
Profile and optimise training throughput on GPU clusters
Publish internal research findings and contribute to academic literature where appropriate

title: Data Scientist — Business Analytics
summary: Partner with business stakeholders across sales, marketing, finance, and operations to surface actionable insights from data. Design and run A/B experiments, build forecasting and segmentation models, and develop self-serve dashboards that empower non-technical decision-makers. Translate ambiguous business questions into rigorous analytical frameworks and communicate findings clearly to executive audiences.
responsibilities:
Define metrics, KPIs, and measurement frameworks in collaboration with business units
Conduct exploratory analysis and statistical hypothesis testing on large datasets
Build predictive models for churn, LTV, demand forecasting, and pricing optimisation
Design and analyse A/B and multi-variate experiments with appropriate power analysis
Develop and maintain BI dashboards for executive and operational reporting
Automate recurring reporting pipelines and data quality checks

title: Data Scientist — Transportation & Logistics
summary: Apply data science and operations research techniques to optimise routing, demand forecasting, fleet management, and supply chain visibility within a transportation context. Work with large-scale geospatial and time-series datasets, and collaborate with engineers to productionise models that drive real-time operational decisions. Domain knowledge in logistics, public transit, or freight is highly valued.
responsibilities:
Build vehicle routing, schedule optimisation, and fleet dispatching models
Develop demand forecasting models using historical trips, weather, and external signals
Analyse GPS telemetry and sensor data to detect anomalies and predict maintenance needs
Create geospatial visualisations and network analyses for route and hub planning
Integrate models into operational systems via REST APIs or streaming pipelines
Present insights and recommendations to operations leadership and external partners

title: NLP Engineer
summary: Design and productionise natural language processing systems spanning text classification, named entity recognition, summarisation, question answering, and retrieval-augmented generation. Work at the intersection of research and engineering to fine-tune large language models, build evaluation harnesses, and deploy scalable NLP microservices. Collaborate with product, design, and data teams to define requirements and iterate rapidly on model quality.
responsibilities:
Fine-tune and evaluate pre-trained language models (BERT, LLaMA, Mistral, GPT-family) for downstream tasks
Build retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) pipelines with vector databases
Develop text preprocessing, tokenisation, and feature engineering pipelines
Design and run offline and online evaluation frameworks for NLP model quality
Optimise models for production using quantisation, distillation, and batching strategies
Implement and maintain NLP microservices with low-latency inference requirements

title: DevOps Engineer
summary: Enable engineering teams to ship software faster and more reliably by designing and maintaining CI/CD pipelines, cloud infrastructure, and observability systems. Champion infrastructure-as-code practices, drive platform standardisation, and serve as the operational backbone for multiple product engineering squads. Actively participate in incident response and lead blameless post-mortems to drive systemic improvement.
responsibilities:
Design, build, and maintain CI/CD pipelines across multiple repositories and environments
Provision and manage cloud infrastructure using Terraform and CloudFormation
Administer Kubernetes clusters and define resource policies, autoscaling, and networking
Implement centralised logging, metrics, and distributed tracing with the ELK/Grafana stack
Manage secrets, certificate rotation, and IAM policies in compliance with security standards
Participate in on-call rotations and lead incident response and post-mortem processes

title: Full Stack Engineer
summary: Build and maintain end-to-end web applications, owning both client-facing interfaces and the backend services and data models that power them. Work in an agile squad to deliver features from design handoff through to production deployment, taking a pragmatic approach to technical decisions and keeping user experience at the forefront. Comfortable context-switching between frontend polish, API design, database tuning, and infrastructure configuration.
responsibilities:
Develop responsive, accessible user interfaces using React or Vue and modern CSS
Design and implement RESTful or GraphQL APIs with appropriate authentication and authorisation
Model and manage relational and document database schemas
Write unit, integration, and end-to-end tests and maintain high coverage standards
Participate in code review, technical design discussions, and architecture decisions
Deploy and monitor applications using cloud platforms and containerised environments

title: Penetration Tester
summary: Conduct authorised offensive security assessments across web applications, APIs, internal networks, cloud environments, and social engineering vectors. Produce detailed, reproducible findings reports with risk-rated vulnerabilities and actionable remediation guidance. Act as a trusted advisor to development and operations teams, embedding a security-first mindset across the organisation through training and threat modelling workshops.
responsibilities:
Perform black-, grey-, and white-box penetration tests against agreed scope
Execute application security testing covering OWASP Top 10 and beyond
Conduct network and infrastructure assessments including active directory attacks
Develop custom exploits and payloads where off-the-shelf tooling is insufficient
Write clear, executive-ready and technical reports with CVSS-scored findings
Support clients through remediation verification and re-testing cycles
required_skills: Active Directory / Azure AD attack paths

title: Database Administrator
summary: Own the reliability, performance, and security of the organisation's database estate spanning relational and NoSQL systems. Design schemas and indexing strategies, implement backup and disaster recovery procedures, and work closely with developers to review query performance and enforce best practices. Lead database migrations and version upgrades with minimal disruption to production services.
responsibilities:
Provision, configure, and maintain production database clusters (PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQL Server)
Monitor query performance and implement indexing, partitioning, and caching optimisations
Design and test backup, point-in-time recovery, and failover procedures
Enforce role-based access controls, encryption at rest and in transit, and audit logging
Plan and execute major version upgrades and schema migrations with zero-downtime strategies
Collaborate with developers during design reviews to advise on schema and query patterns
required_skills: AWS RDS / Aurora / GCP Cloud SQL

title: Systems Administrator
summary: Manage and maintain the organisation's server, network, and end-user computing infrastructure across on-premises and hybrid cloud environments. Ensure maximum system uptime, enforce security hardening baselines, and support day-to-day IT operations for internal teams. Drive automation of repetitive administrative tasks and contribute to capacity planning and technology refresh cycles.
responsibilities:
Administer Linux and Windows Server environments, including patching and configuration management
Manage Active Directory, DNS, DHCP, and Group Policy Objects
Monitor infrastructure health and respond to alerts for servers, storage, and networking equipment
Implement and enforce security baselines (CIS Benchmarks, patching SLAs)
Automate provisioning and configuration drift remediation using Ansible or PowerShell DSC
Support end-user hardware, VPN, and identity and access management (IAM) requests

title: Cloud Engineer
summary: Design, implement, and operate scalable, secure, and cost-efficient cloud infrastructure across one or more major public cloud providers. Partner with application teams to define cloud-native architectures, enforce infrastructure-as-code standards, and establish landing zone patterns that balance autonomy with governance. Drive FinOps practices to track and optimise cloud spend across multiple accounts and workloads.
responsibilities:
Architect and deploy multi-account cloud landing zones with appropriate networking and security controls
Author and maintain infrastructure-as-code modules (Terraform, CDK) used across engineering teams
Implement cloud security controls including IAM least-privilege, SCPs, and compliance guardrails
Design and operate serverless, container, and managed service architectures
Build cost tagging taxonomies and implement FinOps dashboards and reservation strategies
Support engineering teams in migrating on-premises workloads to cloud-native equivalents
required_skills: AWS / GCP / Azure (minimum one deep, one breadth)

title: Mobile Developer
summary: Build high-quality, performant mobile applications for iOS and/or Android, either natively or using cross-platform frameworks. Own features end-to-end from UX collaboration and architecture through to app store submission and post-release monitoring. Champion mobile engineering best practices including offline-first design, accessibility, and rigorous testing on a diverse range of devices and OS versions.
responsibilities:
Develop and maintain mobile applications using Swift / Kotlin or React Native / Flutter
Collaborate with product and design to implement pixel-perfect, accessible UI components
Integrate REST and GraphQL APIs, handle authentication flows, and manage local data persistence
Write unit, widget, and integration tests and maintain CI pipelines for automated builds and releases
Profile and optimise app performance including startup time, memory usage, and battery impact
Manage app store submission, release tracks, and over-the-air update workflows
required_skills: App store deployment (App Store Connect, Google Play Console)
